## 문제 (Problem)

<!-- 무엇이 문제였나요? What was wrong or missing? -->

## 해결 (Solution)

<!-- 어떻게 해결했나요? How does this change fix it? -->

## 검증 (Verification)

<!-- 어떻게 확인했나요? `npm test` 결과, 수동 확인 단계, 스크린샷 등 -->

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Command templates updated in all three copies (if `commands/*.md` changed)
- [ ] Considered Claude Code + Codex, macOS + Windows (if install/update behavior changed)
